_comment: Synapse UI strings — PRIMARY language (English), the source of truth. Read by strings.py (Python) and injected into QML as `Tr` (qt_main.py). ko.json is a frozen snapshot that falls back here per missing key. Keys are screen-domain dotted; {0}/{name} are str.format placeholders. Glyphs (✕ + ▸ ◆ …) and the SYNAPSE wordmark / BPM unit are NOT keyed. See docs/string-i18n-plan.md.
